view.title: Validate explicit UC need #11
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for appliance installation.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 11 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for appliance installation.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for appliance installation.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of multiple aspects of the appliance installation process, including signature capture, photo documentation, and payment processing. However, the prior evidence does not provide concrete API reads or checks that confirm these functionalities are implemented. As a result, the validation is blocked due to a lack of sufficient evidence to assert whether the requirement is satisfied or not.

gaps: No evidence of mobile signature capture functionality.
No evidence of signature capture on documents.
No evidence linking photo documentation to the signature.
No evidence of capturing timestamps and GPS coordinates with signatures.
